task_completion.description: Diagram includes all required hardware components
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for distinct shapes/nodes representing PV Modules, Combiner, Disconnects, Inverter, Service Panel, and Meter on the diagram canvas.

task_completion.description: Diagram illustrates the complete hardware chain from generation to the Utility Grid
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for connecting lines/arrows showing a logical electrical flow starting at the PV Modules/Array and ending at a Utility Grid representation.

task_completion.description: PV Modules and Inverter are labeled with specific manufacturer, model, and ratings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text on or near the PV and Inverter components containing terms like 'Q.PEAK', '400W', 'SolarEdge', and 'SE7600H'.

task_completion.description: Disconnects, Service Panel, and Meter are labeled with specific manufacturer, model, and ratings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text on or near the remaining components containing terms like 'Square D', '60A', '200A', and 'Bi-directional'.

task_completion.description: The source diagram is saved as a .drawio file to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'solar_sld.drawio' appearing on the Desktop, or a 'Save As' dialog confirming this exact path and filename.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as a PNG image to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'solar_sld.png' appearing on the Desktop, or an export dialog in the diagramming tool confirming this exact path and filename.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical diagramming tool (like Draw.io) to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Draw.io interface or a similar diagramming GUI being actively used, rather than a script or terminal command generating the files blindly.

integrity.description: The agent manually constructed the diagram rather than loading a pre-made solution
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for step-by-step placement of shapes, drawing of connecting lines, and typing of text labels in the tool's canvas.

integrity.description: The PNG file was genuinely exported from the diagramming tool
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the 'File -> Export as -> PNG' menu (or similar) in the diagramming tool, rather than taking a generic screen capture.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification file contains real-world product details that must be present in the diagram labels: Hanwha Q CELLS Q.PEAK DUO BLK G10+ 400W panels, SolarEdge SE7600H-US 7.6kW inverter, and Square D 60A disconnect switch. The service panel should be labeled '200A' and the meter should be 'Bi-directional'. Note: The specification file uses the term 'Main Service Panel', so accept that or 'Main Panel'. The topology must flow from the PV Array to the Utility Grid.
